{
  "groups": [
    {

  ],
  "filters": [
    {
      "borderColor": "#00000000",
      "groupId": "gq",
      "id": "q-b",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "BluRay",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?=.*(?:bluray|blu-ray))(?!.*remux)",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "type": "filter"
    },
    {
      "borderColor": "#00000000",
      "groupId": "gq",
      "id": "q-w",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "WebDL",
      "pattern": "(?i)\\b(?:web[-_. ]?dl|webdl|webrip|web-rip)\\b",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "type": "filter"
    },
    {
      "id": "q-r-2",
      "name": "Remux",
      "groupId": "gq",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "pattern": "(?i)\\b(?:bdremux|uhd[\\s.-]?remux|blu[\\s.-]?ray[\\s._-]?remux|remux)\\b",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "textColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "borderColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled"
    },
    {
      "borderColor": "#00000000",
      "groupId": "3f2e1d0c-9b8a-4f7e-8d6c-5b4a39281716",
      "id": "5f758265-9c4c-5aa5-bd5f-547553cd993d",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "SEADEX Release",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?:\\bseadex\\b|ᴀʟᴛ\\s+ʀᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇ|ʙᴇsᴛ\\s+ʀᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇ|alt\\s+release|best\\s+release)",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "3f2e1d0c-9b8a-4f7e-8d6c-5b4a39281716",
      "id": "a542b0b8-8bec-567a-ac42-50e87ec3e11b",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "IMAX",
      "pattern": "(?i)\\bimax\\b",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#00000000"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "9be3e5a6-b81c-5659-b771-e2b111c2d496",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/DV.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DV",
      "pattern": "(?i)\\b(?:dv|dovi|dolby[ ._-]?vision)\\b",
      "tagColor": "#FFBE01",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFBE01"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "1f393f30-df1f-547e-97a7-b6b81404d8b5",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/HDR10Plus.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "HDR10+",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?!.*\\b(?:dv|dovi|dolby[ ._-]?vision)\\b)(?=.*\\bhdr\\s*10\\s*(?:\\+|plus|p)\\b)",
      "tagColor": "#FFBE01",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFBE01"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "f779c5b5-d414-5e94-9012-1636a724f9a9",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/HDR10Plus.png",
      "isEnabled": false,
      "name": "HDR10+ (Without DV)",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?:^|[^a-z0-9])hdr\\s*10\\s*(?:\\+|plus|p)(?=[^a-z0-9]|$)",
      "tagColor": "#FFBE01",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFBE01"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "c2d8eca4-de97-53e4-b151-418c8b88607d",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/HDR10.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "HDR10",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?!.*\\b(?:dv|dovi|dolby[ ._-]?vision)\\b)(?!.*\\bhdr\\s*10\\s*(?:\\+|plus|p)\\b)(?=.*\\bhdr\\s*10\\b)",
      "tagColor": "#FFBE01",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFBE01"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "40c288b5-c99c-52fa-82a0-a17fa55f2f37",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/HDR10.png",
      "isEnabled": false,
      "name": "HDR10 (Without DV)",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?=.*\\b(?:dv|dovi|dolby[ ._-]?vision)\\b)(?=.*\\bhdr(?:\\s*10)?\\b)(?!.*\\bhdr\\s*10\\s*(?:\\+|plus|p)\\b).*",
      "tagColor": "#FFBE01",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFBE01"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "81fcb635-5677-5e0b-85c9-77fd994d0091",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/HDR.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "HDR",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?!.*\\b(?:dv|dovi|dolby[ ._-]?vision)\\b)(?!.*\\bhdr\\s*10\\s*(?:\\+|plus|p)\\b)(?!.*\\bhdr\\s*10\\b)(?=.*\\bhdr\\b).*",
      "tagColor": "#FFBE01",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFBE01"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8",
      "id": "9d1f158a-bb45-5758-b8da-b45c2759f803",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "SDR",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?=.*(?:\\.(?:mkv|mp4|avi|mov|m4v|ts)\\b|\\b(?:x264|x265|xvid|h[ ._-]?264|h[ ._-]?265|hevc|avc|web[-_. ]?dl|webrip|blu[-_. ]?ray|bd[-_. ]?remux|bdremux|remux|bdrip|bdmux|dvd|dvdrip|hdtv|uhd|4k)\\b))(?!.*(?:^|[^A-Za-z0-9])(?:dovi|dv|dolby[ ._-]?vision|hdr10(?:\\+|plus|p)?|hdr[ ._-]?10[ ._-]?(?:\\+|plus|p)?|hdr|hlg)(?=$|[^A-Za-z0-9])).*$",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#00000000"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "1e376aee-96c7-53cb-87e6-ea82d34afca0",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/Atmos.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "ATMOS",
      "pattern": "(?=.*(^|[.\\s_\\-])[aA][tT][mM][oO][sS]([.\\s_\\-]|$))(?=.*(?:[dD][dD][pP]|[dD][dD]\\+|[eE]-?[aA][cC]3|[eE][aA][cC]3))",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "6f4637af-d45c-5ef9-9a35-7adc61ab5a0e",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/TrueHD.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "TRUEHD",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?:\\btrue[ ._-]?hd\\b|^(?=.*\\batmos\\b)(?=.*\\bremux\\b)(?!.*\\b(?:true[ ._-]?hd|ddp|dd\\+|e-?ac3|eac3)\\b).+$)",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "4309bea6-d424-51f4-8099-0deabacfc306",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/dtsx.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DTS-X",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?=.*\\b(dts[-_.: ]?x7?)\\b(?![-_. ]?(26[456])))(?!.*\\bDTS[ .]?[1-9]\\b)(?!.*\\bDD[^a-z+]\\b)(?!.*\\b(ac-?3)\\b)(?!.*\\bDD[P+]\\b)(?!.*\\b(e[-_. ]?ac-?3)\\b)(?!.*\\bTrue[ .-]?HD\\b)(?!.*\\bATMOS(\\\\b|\\\\d)\\b)(?!.*\\bFLAC\\b)(?!.*\\bAAC\\b)(?!.*\\b(l?)PCM\\b)",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "85d60c3f-6e5c-5e06-996f-8232bb686109",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/dtsHDMA.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DTS-HD MA",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?=.*\\b(dts[-_. ]?(ma|hd([-_. ]?ma)?|xll))(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\b(True[ .-]?HD|ATMOS)(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\bDD[P+]|(e[-_. ]?ac-?3)\\b)(?!.*\\bDD[^a-z+]|(?<!e-)\\b(ac-?3)\\b)(?!.*\\b(dts[-_.: ]?x7?)\\b(?![-_. ]?(26[456])))(?!.*\\bFLAC(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\bAAC(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\b(l?)PCM(\\b|\\d))(?!.*dts[-. ]?(es|(hd[. ]?)?(hr|hi)))",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "a47dc0b9-72ed-5bf9-bcba-5e92b602001c",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/dtsHD.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DTS-HD",
      "pattern": "(?i)\\bdts[ .\\-_]?hd(?![ .\\-_]?ma)\\b",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "138d9480-c83e-5735-aa9b-a0190464fbd5",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/DDPLUS.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DOLBY DIGITAL +",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?!.*(?:^|[.\\s_\\-])atmos(?:[.\\s_\\-]|$)).*(?:(d(?:olby)?[ .\\-_]?d(?:igital)?[ .\\-_]?(?:p(?:lus)?|\\+)(?:[ .\\-_]?(?:5[ .\\-_]?1|7[ .\\-_]?1))?)|e[ .\\-_]?ac[ .\\-_]?3).*",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "da8db73e-5b47-560e-a543-abf02335db5c",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/dts.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DTS",
      "pattern": "(?i)^(?=.*\\bDTS(?:\\b|\\d)) (?!.*\\b(?:dts[-_. ]?(?:ma|hd(?:[-_. ]?ma)?|xll))(?:\\b|\\d)) (?!.*dts[-. ]?(?:es|(?:hd[. ]?)?(?:hr|hi))) (?!.*(?:\\bDD[P+]|(?:\\be[-_. ]?ac-?3\\b))) (?!.*(?:True[ .-]?HD|\\bATMOS(?:\\b|\\d))) (?!.*(?:\\bDD[^a-z+]|(?<!e-)\\b(?:ac-?3)\\b)) (?!.*\\b(?:dts[-_.: ]?x7?)\\b(?![-_. ]?(?:26[456]))) (?!.*\\bFLAC(?:\\b|\\d)) (?!.*\\bAAC(?:\\b|\\d)) (?!.*\\b(?:l?)PCM(?:\\b|\\d)).*$",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "8e4b6f8e-2c1e-4f6b-9e8d-3f7a9d1c2e3f",
      "id": "3476e4a0-0f7d-57f1-bd45-13bfa2db5e42",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/DD.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "DOLBY DIGITAL",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?=.*\\bDD[^a-z+]|(?<!e-)\\b(ac-?3)\\b)(?!.*\\bDD[P+]|(e[-_. ]?ac-?3)\\b)(?!.*\\b(True[ .-]?HD|ATMOS)(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\bDTS(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\bFLAC(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\bAAC(\\b|\\d))(?!.*\\b(l?)PCM(\\b|\\d)) ",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "9f8e7d6c-3b2a-4f1e-9c8d-5a6b7e4f3d2c",
      "id": "343880da-882c-5dd8-8686-aee04111d735",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/71.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "7.1 CH",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?=.*[^0-9][7-8][ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*[^0-9]5[ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*[^0-9]6[ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*(?<!repac)[^0-9][1-4][ .][0-1]|\\\\b(Stereo|Mono)\\\\b)",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "9f8e7d6c-3b2a-4f1e-9c8d-5a6b7e4f3d2c",
      "id": "59853061-bc8f-5545-b392-644c22267ef8",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/61.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "6.1 CH",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?=.*[^0-9]6[ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*[^0-9][7-8][ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*[^0-9]5[ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*(?<!repac)[^0-9][1-4][ .][0-1]\\b|\\\\b(Stereo|Mono)\\\\b)",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "groupId": "9f8e7d6c-3b2a-4f1e-9c8d-5a6b7e4f3d2c",
      "id": "e3ab9d1e-9064-53ca-b405-354e40f2455a",
      "imageURL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nobnobz/Omni-Template-Bot-Bid-Raiser/main/Other/regex%20tags/51.png",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "name": "5.1 CH",
      "pattern": "(?i)(?=.*[^0-9]5[ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*[^0-9]6[ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*[^0-9][7-8][ .][0-1]\\b)(?!.*(?<!repac)[^0-9][1-4][ .][0-1]\\b|\\\\b(Stereo|Mono)\\\\b)",
      "tagColor": "#FFFFFF",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "textColor": "#0e0e0e",
      "type": "filter",
      "borderColor": "#FFFFFF"
    },
    {
      "id": "hevc",
      "groupId": "video-codec",
      "name": "HEVC",
      "pattern": "(?i)\\b(hevc|h[\\s._-]?265|x265)\\b",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "borderColor": "#00000000",
      "textColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "type": "filter"
    },
    {
      "id": "avc",
      "groupId": "video-codec",
      "name": "AVC",
      "pattern": "(?i)\\b(avc|h[\\s._-]?264|x264)\\b",
      "imageURL": "data:image/png;base64,",
      "tagColor": "#00000000",
      "borderColor": "#00000000",
      "textColor": "#00000000",
      "tagStyle": "filled",
      "isEnabled": true,
      "type": "filter"
    }
  ]
